commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation delete job gen-idx --ignore-not-found 2>&1'

sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/launcher-v2.yaml && echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/baseline-tp8.yaml && echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/bench-baseline-sweep-v2.yaml'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation get pods -o wide 2>&1'
